<!--
Thanks for contributing. A few notes before you fill this out:

- Code changes belong in the relevant submodule fork, not the umbrella. The umbrella PR (if needed at all) just bumps the submodule pointer.
- For setup, build, or end-user-facing issues, the umbrella is the right place.
- See CONTRIBUTING.md for the full PR workflow.
-->

- [ ] `moonlight-common-c` (protocol)
- [ ] `moonlight-qt` (client)
- [ ] `Apollo` (host)
- [ ] Umbrella only (docs / scripts / CI)

## Checklist

- [ ] Commit message follows repo conventions (imperative ~50-char subject — see CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Tests added or updated where relevant
- [ ] Docs updated if behaviour or interface changed
- [ ] If a submodule is touched: submodule branch pushed before umbrella pointer bump
